chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.97 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 05.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khan, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, Advocate for Applicant ************ On 23.05.2017, following order was passed_ “Learned counsel for the applicant requests for further time to place copy of order to ascertain as to whether department has filed an appeal against the order of the Appellate Tribunal in ITA No.602/KB/2009 in the case of the respondent, on which reliance has been placed by the Commissioner (Appeals) in the instant case. Time is granted. Let pre-admission notice be repeated upon the respondent to be served through first three modes, whereafter, compliance report of bailiff and courier delivery receipt shall be placed on record. Adjourned to a date in office.” Today, Counsel is called absent and no assistance has been provided to the order passed by this Court. In view of above, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
